Bug / Task Description: Argument parsing mis-handles a value that follows a long flag relative to positional arguments: the condition controlling whether the next token is consumed as the flag's value is reversed, so positional arguments are wrongly swallowed as flag values (or flag values are wrongly treated as positionals). Fix the condition so a long flag correctly consumes its following value and the positional list is parsed as intended.
Commit Subject: fix(args): only attach a following value to a flag before positionals appear
